Hero.title:
Accept payments <accent>everywhere</accent>,
by any method
Hero.subtitle: Turn payment complexity into a few lines of code. A single API to centralize your transactions and unlock your business growth.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to revolutionize your payments.

step1.title: Lightning Fast Signup
step1.description: Create your account in minutes and start exploring the dashboard immediately.

step2.title: Easy Integration
step2.description: Copy a few lines of code to your app or use our ready-to-go plugins.

step3.title: Go Live
step3.description: Accept your first payment instantly with our ultra-secure infrastructure.

PaymentMethod.title: Accepted Payment Methods
PaymentMethod.subtitle: We partner with the leading mobile money providers to deliver seamless, secure payment experiences.
PaymentMethod.comingSoon: More providers coming soon — Wave, Visa, Mastercard & more

WhyChoose.title: Why Choose SharePay?
WhyChoose.subtitle: Simplicity meets performance to power your growth.

feature1.title: Radical Simplicity
feature1.description: No more multiple contracts with each provider. One single interface to manage everything.

feature2.title: Deployment Speed
feature2.description: Go from idea to production payment in record time thanks to our SDKs.

feature3.title: Maximum Security
feature3.description: End-to-end encryption and compliance with the strictest industry standards.

feature4.title: Expert Support
feature4.description: A dedicated team of developers to support you at every stage.

Integration.title: Built for developers
Integration.subtitle: We built SharePay with an API-first approach. Enjoy comprehensive documentation, reliable Webhooks and a robust sandbox environment.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: No setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden costs.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.a1: No, signing up for SharePay is completely free.
FAQ.a2: Your funds are transferred automatically or manually to your bank account or mobile money according to your settings.
FAQ.a3: We currently operate in Cameroon and plan to expand throughout the CEMAC zone very soon.

Hero.title: Democratizing Digital Payments in Africa
Hero.subtitle: We are building the financial infrastructure that enables every business, large or small, to thrive in the digital economy.

Story.title: Our Story
Story.content: Born from a desire to simplify complex financial transactions, SharePay has become the trusted partner for thousands of merchants. Our journey is guided by innovation and the desire for real impact on the African entrepreneurial ecosystem.

v2.title: Transparency
v2.desc: Total clarity on our rates and processes.

v3.title: Security
v3.desc: Protecting your funds is our absolute priority.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.subtitle: Our team of experts is here to help you power your business with the best payment solutions.

descriptions.manual: You decide when and how much to withdraw to the destination of your choice. No automatic action is performed.
descriptions.instant: Your funds will be automatically and immediately transferred to the selected destination upon receipt.
descriptions.threshold: As soon as your available balance reaches the defined threshold, an automatic withdrawal is triggered to your destination of choice.
descriptions.periodic: Your funds will be transferred automatically according to the chosen frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) to your destination.

Developers.UnderConstructionDesc: The documentation content for this section is currently being written by our team and will be published soon.

Intro.title: Developer Documentation
Intro.description: Welcome to the SharePay platform. Our API and developer tools allow you to accept payments, manage subscriptions, and scale your global commerce infrastructure with security at the core. Get started in minutes with our robust SDKs and comprehensive REST API.
Intro.restApiDesc: Full control over your payments with our granular REST endpoints.
Intro.webhooksDesc: Real-time notifications for payment events and state changes.
Intro.sdksDesc: Official client libraries for JS, iOS, Android, and backend languages.
Intro.quickstartDesc: To begin integrating SharePay, you'll need to obtain your API keys from the Developer Dashboard. We provide both test and live keys. Never share your secret keys or include them in client-side code.
Intro.apiVersion: Our API versioning follows a date-based format. The current version is
Intro.paymentMethodsDesc: We currently support payments via MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money to facilitate your local transactions.

FAQ.heroSubtitle: Find answers to your questions about SharePay, payments, integrations, and more.
FAQ.noResults: No questions found for this category.
FAQ.helpDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is available 24/7.

General.title: General Questions
General.q1: How do I create a SharePay account?
General.a1: Sign up with your business email, complete KYC verification, and link your bank account. Once approved, you can immediately start accepting payments via your dashboard.
General.a2: SharePay currently covers Cameroon and is expanding across Central and West Africa. Check our roadmap for upcoming countries.
General.q3: How long does account verification take?
General.a3: KYC verification is typically completed within 24 to 48 business hours after submitting all required documents.
General.q4: Can I test before going live?
General.a4: Yes. Every account has access to a full sandbox environment that mirrors production, so you can test your entire payment flow with no real money involved.

Payments.title: Payments
Payments.a1: We currently support MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. Visa, Mastercard, Wave, and other methods are coming soon.
Payments.q2: How do I receive my payouts?
Payments.a2: Funds collected are transferred to your registered bank account according to your configured payout schedule (daily, weekly, or on-demand).
Payments.q3: What happens if a payment fails?
Payments.a3: Failed transactions are reported in real time in your dashboard with the reason for failure. The customer is never charged and can retry.
Payments.q4: Is there a minimum transaction amount?
Payments.a4: The minimum transaction amount is 100 FCFA. There is no set maximum, though high-volume merchants may need additional verification.

Security.title: Security & Compliance
Security.a1: Absolutely. SharePay uses AES-256 encryption, HTTPS-only communication, and follows PCI-DSS standards to protect all transaction data.
Security.a2: All personal and financial data is stored in encrypted databases and never shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
Security.q3: What happens if a fraudulent transaction occurs?
Security.a3: Our fraud detection engine monitors every transaction in real time. Suspicious transactions are automatically blocked, and you are immediately notified.
Security.a4: Yes. SharePay supports 2FA via authenticator apps (TOTP). We strongly recommend enabling it in your account security settings to add an extra layer of protection.

Developer.title: Developer & API
Developer.q1: How do I integrate the SharePay API?
Developer.a1: Generate your API keys from the dashboard, follow our REST API documentation, and make your first call in minutes. SDKs are available for JavaScript, Python, and PHP.
Developer.a2: Yes. Switch between Live and Sandbox modes directly in the dashboard. The sandbox mirrors the production API so you can test without any real transactions.
Developer.a3: Configure a webhook URL in your dashboard. SharePay sends a signed POST request for each payment event (created, succeeded, failed) so your system stays in sync in real time.
Developer.q4: Are there rate limits on the API?
Developer.a4: Yes. The default limit is 300 requests per minute per API key. If your integration requires higher throughput, contact us to discuss a custom rate limit plan.

Billing.title: Billing & Fees
Billing.q1: Are there monthly or setup fees?
Billing.a1: No. SharePay operates on a pure pay-per-use model. You only pay a small percentage per successful transaction — no monthly fees, no setup fees, no hidden charges.
Billing.a2: The standard rate is 1.5% per transaction for Mobile Money. Volume discounts are available for high-traffic merchants — contact us for a custom quote.
Billing.q3: When are funds available after a payment?
Billing.a3: Funds are typically available for payout within 24 hours of a successful transaction, subject to your configured payout schedule.
Billing.q4: Can I change my pricing plan at any time?
Billing.a4: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from the Billing section of your dashboard. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated accordingly.
